## Checklist

- [ ] Code is in a feature branch `feature/TXX-short-name`
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits (`feat(scope): TXX summary`)
- [ ] `./gradlew build` passes (backend)
- [ ] `npm run build` passes (frontend, if changed)
- [ ] Unit tests written
- [ ] OpenAPI spec updated (if API changed)
- [ ] Service builds as Docker image
- [ ] Structured logs added
- [ ] `.env.example` updated (if new env vars)
- [ ] No critical SonarQube issues
- [ ] Screenshots attached (frontend PRs)
